texto: Rise above the deceptions and temptations of the mind. This is your duty. You are born for this only
autor: all other duties are self-created and self-imposed owing to ignorance.
explicacao: Citação de all other duties are self-created and self-imposed owing to ignorance. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Rise above the deceptions and temptations of the mind. This is your duty. You are born for this only” articula reflexao, sivananda-saraswati, above em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
